title: Riot Platforms Inc (RIOT) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue and Strategic Growth
text: Riot achieved record revenues of $376.7 million in 2024, representing a 34% year-over-year increase. The company swung to profitability with net income of $109.4 million ($0.40 per share), compared to a $49.5 million loss in 2023. Gross profit climbed to $147.6 million from $97.6 million, while adjusted EBITDA surged to $463.2 million, more than doubling the prior year's $214 million figure. Bitcoin mining revenue reached $321 million, up 70% annually. However, production declined to 4,828 Bitcoin, representing a 27% decrease due to the halving event. Despite lower production, Riot's Bitcoin holdings grew substantially to 17,722 Bitcoin, a 141% increase from Q3 2024. The company increased its self-mining hash rate by 154% in 2024, significantly outpacing global growth of 67%. Mining costs rose to $42,011 per Bitcoin in Q4 2024, driven by elevated power expenses of $0.034 per kilowatt hour. The engineering business generated $38.5 million in revenue, down from $64.3 million, while the E4A Solutions acquisition contributed $28.2 million in revenue with 31% growth. Management plans approximately 22% hash rate expansion in 2025 while exploring AI/HPC opportunities.
